concerns.text: T033 implements McNemar's test but spec FR-005 requires Wilcoxon for pass@1. Implementer cannot deterministically execute without spec amendment or explicit override instruction.
T035 implements Bonferroni for 3 hypotheses but spec FR-005 specifies 2 hypotheses (accuracy, latency). Ambiguous deliverable without spec-plan alignment.
T036 implements rank-biserial correlation but spec FR-006 requires Cohen's d. Contradictory effect size specification makes task non-deterministic.
T007 'Configure linting and formatting tools (ruff, black)' lacks concrete deliverable. No config file paths, no version pins, no verification criteria specified.
T012 'Create schema validation tests' lacks concrete schema definitions. Implementer cannot execute without knowing which schemas to validate or where contracts/ definitions live.
T013 'Setup state tracking for artifact versioning in state/map.json' lacks schema. No fields specified for checksums, timestamps, or artifact hashes required by Constitution Principle III.
T041-T043 are test execution tasks without pass/fail criteria. 'Run unit tests' is not verifiable without specifying expected test count, coverage threshold, or exit code.
T044-T048 are cleanup/verification tasks without concrete acceptance criteria. 'Documentation updates' and 'Code cleanup' lack measurable completion conditions.
Phase 0 tasks lack explicit output format. T001-T004 document in research.md but don't specify required sections, table formats, or minimum content for verification.
